creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
See http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR214864cxx98-default/2018-05-29_20h14m12s/logs/errors/lazarus-gtk2-1.8.2.log

editors/lazarus, editors/lazarus-qt4, editors/lazarus-qt5:
../tools/svn2revisioninc .. revision.inc
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:4378: revisioninc] Segmentation fault (core dumped)

I was not able to reproduce the failure - it worked for me.
